_comment: A recorded-shape IBKR reqSecDefOptParams (OptionChain) + contract_details for SPX. Neutral shape (the upstream ibapi OptionChain/ContractDetails do not derive serde), parsed in src/providers/ibkr.rs tests into RawOptionParams + RawContractDetail. Multiplier 100, three near-ATM strikes, one target expiry with an authoritative 16:15 US/Eastern last-trade time.
